settings.label: Logo Image
settings.info: Upload your primary logo. This will be used in the header and across the site. Recommended size is 400 X 200 PX, trasparent image.

settings.label: t:settings_schema.logo_favicon.settings.logo.logo_on_transparent.label
settings.info: Upload an alternate logo for transparent backgrounds (e.g., sticky header). Recommended size is 400 X 200 PX, trasparent image.

settings.label: Use logo image URLs instead of uploaded files
Logo Image (URL)
settings.info: Paste a full URL (https://...) to an image. Used only if the toggle above is enabled.

settings.label: Logo Image Transparent (URL)
settings.info: Optional. If empty, will fall back to the normal logo URL or the uploaded transparent logo.

settings.content: If you want more advanced customizations for the transparent logo, check the header section settings. There, you’ll find options for logo transparency, position, size, menu color, and more.
If you don’t have a logo yet, you can [Create your own logo here](https://www.shopify.com/tools/logo-maker).

settings.label: Desktop Logo Size
settings.info: Adjust the width of the logo on desktop screens.

settings.label: Mobile Logo Size
settings.info: Control the logo size on mobile devices.

settings.label: Horizontal Position Logo Transparent
settings.info: Adjust the horizontal position of the logo when the header is transparent.

settings.label: Logo Transparent Width
settings.info: Adjust the width of the logo when the header is transparent.

settings.label: Mobile Logo Horizontal Position
settings.info: Adjust the horizontal positioning of the mobile logo (left or right shift).

settings.label: Desktop Logo Horizontal Position
settings.info: Adjust the horizontal positioning of the desktop logo (left or right shift).

settings.content: A favicon is a small icon that appears in browser tabs, bookmarks, and search results.For best results, use a square image e.g (32x32px , 51x51 px or 100x100px) .

settings.label: Favicon Image
settings.info: 32 x 32px or 50 x 50 image favicon recommended.

settings.content: If you don’t have a favicon , you can [Create your own favicon here for free](https://favicon.io/favicon-converter/).

settings.label: Enable Fade-In Animation
settings.info: Fades each section in as it scrolls into view.

settings.label: Animation Duration (seconds)
settings.info: How long the fade-in transition lasts.

settings.label: Enable Rounded Corners
settings.info:
Toggle this setting to enable rounded corners on various UI elements for a softer, modern look.

Note: Rounded corners may not apply to some elements due to additional customization and specific design choices in certain sections.

settings.label: Rounded Corner Radius
settings.info: Adjust the corner radius of UI elements to control how rounded they appear.

settings.label: General Fluid Container Width
settings.info: Controls the overall width of sections set to fluid layout. A fluid container stretches to fit the entire screen width and adjusts dynamically as the viewport resizes.

settings.label: General Page Width
settings.info: Defines the maximum width of your website's content. This affects text, images, and layouts, ensuring readability on different screen sizes.

settings.label: Enable Right-to-Left (RTL) Mode
settings.info: Activate this setting to support languages that use right-to-left text direction, such as Arabic or Hebrew. It automatically adjusts page layouts and text alignment.

settings.label: RTL Language Codes
settings.info: Enter the language codes (comma-separated) for languages that require RTL mode. Example: 'ar' for Arabic, 'he' for Hebrew, 'ur' for Urdu.
Customize the fonts and styles for your site’s headings.

settings.label: Custom Font URL for Headings
settings.info: To easily add a custom font, make sure your font file is in TTF or OTF format. Simply go to Shopify Admin Panel → Content → Files, upload your font file, copy the font file URL, and paste it into the input field in your theme settings Paste the URL of your custom font (e.g., a .woff2 or .css file). This will override default fonts when enabled.
If you want to use a Google Font for headings, provide the embed code and font name below.

settings.label: Paste Google Font Embed Code for Headings
Google Font Name for Headings
settings.info: Enter the exact name of the Google Font.
Customize the fonts and styles for your site’s main text.

settings.label: Choose Font Source for Body Text
Custom Font URL for Body
settings.info: To easily add a custom font, make sure your font file is in TTF or OTF format. Simply go to Shopify Admin Panel → Content → Files, upload your font file, copy the font file URL, and paste it into the input field in your theme settings Paste the URL of your custom font (e.g., a .woff2 or .css file). This will override default fonts when enabled.

settings.label: Select Shopify Font for Body Text

settings.content: ✏️ Google Font Settings for Body Text
settings.info: If you want to use a Google Font for body text, provide the embed code and font name below.

settings.label: Paste Google Font Embed Code for Body Text
Google Font Name for Body Text

settings.info: Select which font style will be used for your site's menus.
The primary and secondary buttons use the body font. Other button fonts can't be changed due to specific customizations. Here, you can adjust additional button settings.

settings.label: Button Font Weight
settings.info: Adjust the thickness of the button text. Choose between 200 (thin) and 700 (bold).

definition.content: Color schemes can be applied to sections throughout your online store, allowing for a cohesive and visually appealing design. However, not all sections are customizable through the scheme, as some sections may require extra customization to meet specific user preferences and design needs.

definition.label: t:settings_schema.colors.settings.header.background
definition.info: Defines the main background color for your store.

definition.label: t:settings_schema.colors.settings.background_gradient.label
definition.info: Sets a gradient background effect for enhanced visuals.

definition.label: t:settings_schema.colors.settings.primary_color.label
definition.info: This is the main accent color used across your store.

definition.label: t:settings_schema.colors.settings.text_color.label
definition.info: Defines the primary text color for readability.

definition.label: t:settings_schema.colors.settings.heading_color.label
definition.info: Used for headings to ensure contrast and visibility.

definition.label: t:settings_schema.colors.settings.border_color.label
definition.info: Sets the color for borders and separators.

definition.label: t:settings_schema.colors.name
definition.info: Defines the color of text-based buttons (links).

definition.label: t:settings_schema.colors.settings.hover_color.label
definition.info: Changes the color of text-based buttons when hovered.

settings.label: Enable Website Intro
settings.info: Enable this option to activate the website intro animation.

settings.label: Show the intro only on the first load of the website
settings.info: If enabled, the intro will be shown only once when a user visits the site for the first time.

settings.label: Behavior

options.label: Show only on first access of the site

settings.info:
Defines how the website intro appears. 
- 'Show only on first access' will display the intro once when a user first visits. 
- 'Show on every page' will make it appear on all page loads. 
- 'Show always (Testing Mode)' will make it appear every time for testing purposes. 
- 'Show only once per day' uses cookies/local storage to prevent reappearance until the next day.If you want to see the feature and you're not in testing mode, try using another browser.

settings.label: Intro Duration (seconds)
settings.info: Set the duration (in seconds) for how long the intro animation should be visible.

settings.label: Enable Background Color instead of Image
settings.info: If enabled, the intro background will use a solid color instead of an image.

settings.label: Background Color
settings.info: Choose the background color for the intro when 'Enable Background Color' is active.

settings.label: Background Image
settings.info: Upload an image to use as the intro background. Overrides background color if selected.

settings.label: Background Image Brightness (0-100)
settings.info: Adjusts the brightness of the background image (0 = darkest, 100 = normal).

settings.label: Background Image Blur (px)
settings.info: Applies a blur effect to the background image. Higher values create a stronger blur.

settings.label: Intro Logo Image
settings.info: Upload a logo image to display in the intro animation.

settings.label: Logo Image Size (px)
settings.info: Set the size of the logo image in pixels.

settings.label: Logo Animation
settings.info: Select an animation effect for the intro logo.

settings.label: Enable Text Above Loading Bar
settings.info: If enabled, a custom text message will be displayed above the loading bar.

settings.label: Intro Loading Text
settings.info: Enter the text to display above the loading bar.

settings.label: Intro Loading Text Color
settings.info: Choose a color for the loading text.

settings.label: Intro Loading Text Font Size (px)
settings.info: Set the font size of the intro loading text.

settings.label: Loading Bar Style
settings.info: Choose a style for the loading bar animation.

settings.label: Loading Bar Unfilled Color
settings.info: Select the color for the unfilled portion of the loading bar.

settings.label: Loading Bar Filled Color
settings.info: Choose the color for the filled portion of the loading bar.

settings.label: Enable White Glow for Loading Bar
settings.info: If enabled, the loading bar will have a white glow effect.

settings.content: Browser tab messages are displayed when users switch to another tab, helping to regain their attention. If no custom messages are set, the default website name will be displayed instead.

settings.label: Enable Browser Tab Messages
settings.info: Turn this feature on to show attention-grabbing messages in the browser tab when users navigate away from your site.

settings.label: Browser Tab Primary Message
settings.info: This is the first message displayed in the browser tab when a user becomes inactive. Use an engaging phrase to bring them back.

settings.label: Browser Tab Secondary Message
settings.info: This message appears after the primary message, creating a sense of urgency or curiosity to encourage users to return.

settings.label: Display Sale Badge
settings.info: Enable this option to show a 'Sale' badge on discounted products.

settings.label: Sale Badge Display Style
settings.info: Choose how the sale badge should display the discount.

settings.label: Sale Badge Background Color
settings.info: Customize the background color of the sale badge.

settings.label: Sale Badge Text Color
settings.info: Choose the color of the text inside the sale badge.

settings.label: Badge Corner Roundness
settings.info: Adjust the roundness of the badge corners. Set to 0 for sharp edges or up to 15 for rounded corners.

settings.label: Enable NEW Badge for Desktop Version only
Enable NEW Badge for Mobile Device (Mobile View only)
Product URLs for 'NEW' Badge #1 (comma-separated)
settings.info: Enter the URLs of products to assign the 'NEW' badge. Example: /products/trap-dutty-free-loops

settings.label: Product URLs for 'NEW' Badge #2 (comma-separated)
settings.info: Enter additional product URLs to assign the 'NEW' badge. Example: /products/trap-dutty-free-loops

settings.label: Product URLs for 'NEW' Badge #3 (comma-separated)
settings.info: Enter more product URLs to assign the 'NEW' badge. Example: /products/trap-dutty-free-loops

settings.label: Product URLs for 'NEW' Badge #4 (comma-separated)
settings.info: Enter additional product URLs for the 'NEW' badge.  Example: /products/trap-dutty-free-loops

settings.label: Product URLs for 'NEW' Badge #5 (comma-separated)
settings.info: Enter more product URLs to assign the 'NEW' badge. Example: /products/trap-dutty-free-loops

settings.label: 'NEW' Badge Text
settings.info: Customize the text displayed on the 'NEW' badge.

settings.label: 'NEW' Badge Corner Radius (px)
settings.info: Adjust the roundness of the 'NEW' badge corners by setting the radius in pixels.

settings.label: 'NEW' Badge Background Color
settings.info: Choose the background color for the 'NEW' badge to make it stand out.

settings.label: 'NEW' Badge Text Color
settings.info: Set the color of the text inside the 'NEW' badge for better readability.

settings.label: Enable Pre-Order Badge
settings.info: Enable this option to display a 'Pre-Order' badge on products that are available for pre-order.

settings.label: Pre-Order Badge Background Color
settings.info: Set the background color of the pre-order badge.

settings.label: Pre-Order Badge Text Color
settings.info: Select the color of the text inside the pre-order badge.

settings.label: Enable Sold-Out Badge
settings.info: Enable this option to show a 'Sold Out' badge on products that are no longer in stock.

settings.label: Sold-Out Badge Background Color
settings.info: Set the background color of the sold-out badge.

settings.label: Sold-Out Badge Text Color
settings.info: Choose the text color for the sold-out badge.
Customize the appearance of your primary action buttons to align with your brand.

settings.label: Primary Button Background Color
settings.info: Select the background color for the primary buttons used across your site.

settings.label: Primary Button Hover Background Color
settings.info: Choose the background color when users hover over the primary buttons.

settings.label: Primary Button Text Color
settings.info: Set the text color for the primary buttons to ensure readability.

settings.label: Primary Button Hover Text Color
settings.info: Define the text color for primary buttons on hover to maintain contrast.

settings.label: Primary Button Border Thickness
settings.info: Adjust the thickness of the border around primary buttons.

settings.label: Primary Button Border Color
settings.info: Choose the color of the border surrounding primary buttons.

settings.label: Primary Button Border Radius
settings.info: Set the curvature of the primary button corners for a rounded or sharp look.
Modify the styling of secondary outline buttons to complement primary buttons.

settings.label: Outline Button Background Color
settings.info: Select the background color for secondary outline buttons.

settings.label: Outline Button Hover Background Color
settings.info: Choose the background color for outline buttons when hovered.

settings.label: Outline Button Text Color
settings.info: Set the text color for secondary outline buttons.

settings.label: Outline Button Hover Text Color
settings.info: Define the text color for outline buttons on hover.

settings.label: Outline Button Border Thickness
settings.info: Adjust the border thickness for secondary outline buttons.

settings.label: Outline Button Border Color
settings.info: Choose the color for the border of outline buttons.

settings.label: Outline Button Border Radius
settings.info: Set the border radius for outline buttons to achieve desired corner curvature.
Configure the appearance of payment-related buttons on product pages.

settings.label: Payment Button Background Color
settings.info: Select the background color for payment option buttons.

settings.label: Payment Button Text Color
settings.info: Set the text color for payment option buttons to ensure clarity.

settings.label: Payment Button Border Color
settings.info: Choose the border color for payment option buttons.

settings.label: Payment Button Border Radius
settings.info: Adjust the border radius for payment buttons to control corner rounding.

settings.label: Payment Button Border Thickness
settings.info: Set the thickness of the border around payment option buttons.

settings.content: Add To Cart Button Customizations - Product Page
settings.info: Customize the 'Add to Cart' button to enhance user interaction on product pages.

settings.label: Add to Cart Button Background Color
settings.info: Select the background color for the 'Add to Cart' button.

settings.label: Add to Cart Button Text Color
settings.info: Set the text color for the 'Add to Cart' button to ensure visibility.

settings.label: Add to Cart Button Border Color
settings.info: Choose the border color for the 'Add to Cart' button.

settings.label: Add to Cart Button Border Thickness
settings.info: Adjust the border thickness of the 'Add to Cart' button.

settings.label: Add to Cart Button Border Radius
settings.info: Set the border radius for the 'Add to Cart' button to control corner rounding.

settings.label: Add to Cart Button Hover Background Color
settings.info: Choose the background color for the 'Add to Cart' button when hovered.
Customize the buttons related to cart recommendations to enhance user engagement.

settings.label: Cart Recommendations Button Text Color
settings.info: Set the text color for cart recommendation buttons.

settings.label: Cart Recommendations Button Hover Text Color
settings.info: Define the text color for cart recommendation buttons on hover.

settings.label: Cart Recommendations Button Font Size
settings.info: Adjust the font size for text within cart recommendation buttons.

settings.label: Enable Secondary Image On Hover
settings.info: Enable secondary image on hover product card.

settings.label: Enable Zoom on Secondary Image
settings.info: When enabled, this setting allows zoom functionality on the secondary image.

settings.label: Enable Fade Effect on Hover
settings.info: Apply a fade effect when hovering over the product image.

settings.label: Enable Fade-In-Up Effect on Hover
settings.info: Display a fade-in-up effect when hovering, enhancing visual appeal.

settings.label: Show 'Select Options' on Hover
settings.info: Displays the 'Select Options' button when a user hovers over the product image.

settings.label: Enable Quick Add Popup
settings.info: Adds a Quick Add button on product cards — customers pick a variant and add to cart from a popup, without leaving the collection page.

settings.label: Show Vendor Name
settings.info: Display the vendor name under the product title.

settings.label: Show Product Ratings
settings.info: Enable star ratings on product cards. You can integrate an app like Judge.me for this.

settings.label: Enable Cart General
settings.info: Show or hide the cart in general

settings.label: Enable Catalog Mode
settings.info: Disables purchasing and hides 'Select Options' buttons, making your store browse-only.

settings.label: Hide Product Prices
settings.info: Conceals product prices when catalog mode is enabled.

settings.label: Choose Product Card Style
settings.info: Select the overall layout and design of your product cards.

settings.label: Product Image Ratio
settings.info: Select the aspect ratio for product images.

settings.label: Custom Image Ratio
settings.info: Define a custom aspect ratio for product images (e.g., 16:9).

settings.label: Add to Cart Button Border Radius
Add to Cart Button Background Color
Add to Cart Button Background Hover Color
Add to Cart Button Text Color
Add to Cart Button Text Hover Color
Add to Cart Button Font Weight
Text Alignment
settings.info: Choose how product details are aligned.

settings.label: Product Name Formatting
settings.info: Choose the text format for product names.

settings.label: Product Title Font Size
settings.info: Set the font size of the product title (in pixels).

settings.label: Compare Price Text Color
settings.info: Set the color for the compare price text.

settings.label: Compare Price Font Size
settings.info: Adjust the font size for the compare price text (in pixels).

settings.label: Vendor Name Text Color
settings.info: Choose the color for the vendor name displayed on product cards.

settings.label: Enable Color Swatches
settings.info: Turn on color swatches to display product color options visually instead of dropdowns.

settings.label: Swatch Display Type
settings.info: Choose how product variants should be represented – as color swatches or variant images.

settings.label: Keywords for Color Swatches
settings.info: Define words that trigger color swatches (e.g., Color, Colour, Cor). Use a comma to separate multiple values.

settings.label: Keywords for Size Selection
settings.info: Specify words that trigger size swatches (e.g., Size, Measure). Use a comma to separate multiple values.

settings.label: Search Box Display Style
settings.info: Choose how the search function appears – as a popup, drawer, or standard inline search.

settings.label: Search Results Type
settings.info: Define what type of content the search should return – products only or all content.

settings.label: Search Bar Corner Roundness
settings.info: Adjust the corner radius of the search bar to make it more rounded or sharp.

settings.label: Search Bar Focus Color
settings.info: Choose the highlight color when users click into the search bar.

settings.label: Default Search Desktop Background Color
settings.info: Select the background color for the search popup on desktop.

settings.label: Enable Trending Search Suggestions
settings.info: Show suggested results as users type in the search bar to enhance navigation.

settings.label: Predefined Search Keywords
settings.info: Set common search keywords that will be suggested when users type in the search bar.For e.g ( delimano chef, ai watterbottle, brand notes ) .

settings.label: Suggested  Collections
settings.info: Specify collections that will appear as suggested results in the search bar.

settings.label: Trending Pill Background Color
settings.info: Select the background color for the trending pill button.

settings.label: Trending Pill Text Color
settings.info: Select the text color for the trending pill button.

settings.label: Trending Pill Border Radius
settings.info: Adjust the roundness of the trending pill button.

settings.label: Trending Pill Hover Background Color
settings.info: Select the background color when hovering over the trending pill button.

settings.label: Show Prices in Search Results
settings.info: Display product prices directly in the search result dropdown.

settings.label: Enable Wishlist Feature
settings.info: Toggle this setting to enable or disable the Wishlist button on product cards.

settings.label: Show Wishlist Button on Mobile
settings.info: Choose whether the Wishlist button should be visible on mobile devices.

settings.label: Wishlist Button Background
settings.info: Set the default background color for the Wishlist button.

settings.label: Wishlist Button Active Background
settings.info: Set the background color when the Wishlist button is active (selected).

settings.label: Wishlist Button Border
settings.info: Define the border color for the Wishlist button.

settings.label: Wishlist Icon Color
settings.info: Choose the default color for the Wishlist icon.

settings.label: Wishlist Icon Checked Color
settings.info: Choose the color for the Wishlist icon when an item is added.

settings.label: Wishlist Button Vertical Position (Desktop)
settings.info: Adjust the vertical position of the Wishlist button on desktop screens.

settings.label: Wishlist Button Vertical Position (Mobile)
settings.info: Adjust the vertical position of the Wishlist button on mobile devices.

settings.label: Remove Button Background
settings.info: Set the background color of the remove button on the Wishlist page.

settings.label: Remove Button Border
settings.info: Set the border color of the remove button on the Wishlist page.

settings.label: Remove Button Icon Color
settings.info: Set the color of the remove button’s SVG icon.

settings.label: Action on Adding to Wishlist
settings.info: Choose what happens when a user adds an item to the Wishlist.

options.label: Remove item from Wishlist when clicked again
Redirect to the Wishlist page after adding an item

settings.info: Configure what happens when customers add items to the cart.

settings.label: Post-Add to Cart Action
settings.info: Decide what happens when a customer adds a product to the cart.
Personalize the look and feel of the cart drawer.

settings.label: Shipping Bar Background
settings.info: Select the background color of the shipping progress bar.

settings.label: Shipping Bar Height
settings.info: Adjust the height of the shipping progress bar.

settings.label: Shipping Bar Fill Color
settings.info: Choose the color that fills the progress bar as the cart total increases.

settings.label: Free Shipping Message Color
settings.info: Set the text color of the free shipping message.

settings.label: Free Shipping Price Highlight
settings.info: Choose the color for the free shipping price text.
Display a progress bar encouraging customers to reach the free shipping threshold.

settings.label: Show Free Shipping Bar
settings.info: Enable the free shipping bar on both the minicart and main cart page.

settings.label: Free Shipping Threshold
settings.info: Set the minimum cart value required for free shipping.
Additional features to improve the cart page experience.

settings.label: Offer Protective Packaging
settings.info: Provide an option for customers to add protective packaging for their order.

settings.label: Select Protective Packaging Product
settings.info: Choose a specific product that will be used as an optional add-on for protective packaging.
Add urgency to increase conversions.

settings.label: Display Timer in Cart
settings.info: Enable a countdown timer on cart page.
Boost sales with recommended products in the cart.

settings.label: Recommendations Section Title
settings.info: Customize the title for the product recommendations section.

settings.label: Cart Drawer Recommendations
settings.info: Control how product recommendations are displayed in the minicart.

settings.label: Show Recommendations on Cart Page
settings.info: Enable recommended products on the cart page.

settings.label: Recommendation Type
settings.info: Choose how products are recommended.

settings.label: Choose Recommended Products
settings.info: Manually select products to be displayed if 'Manual Selection' is chosen.
Engage customers with an Instagram CTA in the cart.

settings.label: Enable Instagram CTA
settings.info: Display an Instagram follow message in the cart.

settings.label: CTA Accent Color
settings.info: Set the color of the Instagram call-to-action text.

settings.label: Instagram Profile Link
settings.info: Provide the URL of your Instagram account.

settings.label: Instagram Icon SVG Code
settings.info: Paste the SVG code of the Instagram icon for the call to action.

settings.label: Social Media Icons - Default Color
settings.info: Select the default color for your social media icons.

settings.label: Social Media Icons - Hover Color
settings.info: Choose the color displayed when users hover over your social icons.

settings.label: Icon Size on Desktop
settings.info: Adjust the size of the social media icons for desktop users.

settings.label: Icon Size on Mobile
settings.info: Modify the size of the social media icons for mobile users.

settings.label: Spacing Between Icons (px)
settings.info: Set the horizontal spacing between social media icons.

settings.label: Facebook Profile URL
settings.info: Enter your Facebook profile or page link.

settings.label: Instagram Profile URL
settings.info: Provide the link to your Instagram profile.

settings.label: X (Formerly Twitter) Profile URL
settings.info: Insert your profile link for X (formerly Twitter).

settings.label: YouTube Channel URL
settings.info: Add the link to your YouTube channel.

settings.label: TikTok Profile URL
settings.info: Include your TikTok profile link.

settings.label: Pinterest Profile URL
settings.info: Specify the URL of your Pinterest profile.

settings.label: LinkedIn Profile URL
settings.info: Provide the link to your LinkedIn profile.

settings.label: WhatsApp Contact Number
settings.info: Enter your WhatsApp number (with country code) for direct messaging.

settings.content: The preloader helps improve the user experience by displaying a loading animation before the website fully loads. Choose a style below, or upload a custom GIF/image.

settings.label: Custom Preloader Image Logo or GIF
settings.info: Upload your own preloader image or GIF. You can create or download GIF animations from external sources like [Gifer](https://gifer.com/en/gifs/loader). Simply download the GIF and upload it here.

settings.content: Customize the size and duration of the preloader below.
Customize how currency information is displayed in your store. You can choose whether to show the currency code alongside prices for better clarity.

settings.label: Display Currency Code
settings.info: Enable this option to show the currency code (e.g., USD, EUR) next to product prices. This helps customers easily identify the currency being used.

settings.content: Manage how your website handles cookies and user consent. This section allows you to customize cookie-related messages, buttons, and settings.

settings.label: Enable Cookie Consent Banner
settings.info: Turn this on to display a cookie consent banner to inform visitors about cookie usage and request their consent.

settings.label: Cookie Banner Heading
settings.info: Enter a custom heading for your cookie banner, such as 'We Value Your Privacy' or 'Cookie Preferences'.

settings.label: Cookie Banner Message
settings.info: Customize the message that appears in the cookie banner. You can explain why cookies are used and provide a link to your cookie policy.
settings.default: We use cookies to enhance your browsing experience, serve personalized ads, and analyze our traffic. By clicking "Allow Cookies", you consent to our use of cookies. More info

settings.label: Accept Cookies Button Text
settings.info: Customize the text for the button that allows users to accept cookies.

settings.label: Decline Cookies Button Text
settings.info: Customize the text for the button that lets users refuse cookies.

settings.label: Enable Smooth Fast Speed Optimization
settings.info: Optimizes website speed by enabling lazy loading for images and deferring non-essential JavaScript. Recommended for better performance and faster page load times.

settings.label: Preload Critical Resources
settings.info: Preloads important assets like fonts, stylesheets, and hero images before other content loads. This speeds up page rendering.

settings.content: Manage your store's essential contact details and location settings. This section allows you to configure the phone number, email, and address that will be displayed on your website.

settings.label: Store Phone Number
settings.info: Enter your store's primary contact number. This number will be displayed in the footer and other contact sections of your site.

settings.label: Store Email Address
settings.info: Provide your official store email. Customers will use this email to contact support or inquiries.

settings.label: Store Physical Address
settings.info: Input your store's physical location. This will be used for customer inquiries, shipping policies, and other location-based details.

settings.label: Select Terms & Conditions Page
settings.info: Choose an existing page that contains the full Terms & Conditions. This link will be used for reference in customer agreements.

settings.label: Enable Terms & Conditions Checkbox in Cart
settings.info: When enabled, customers must accept the Terms & Conditions before proceeding with their purchase in the cart.

settings.label: Show Terms & Conditions Checkbox on Product Page
settings.info: This setting adds a checkbox to the product page, ensuring customers acknowledge the terms before adding a product to their cart.

settings.label: Custom Terms & Conditions Text
settings.default: By continuing, you agree to our Terms & Conditions.
settings.info: Modify the text that appears alongside the checkbox. You can add links, styling, or custom messaging here.
